items.label: Assessment
items.value: The evidence provided does not include any checks or validations related to the required seat metadata, specifically the section, row, number, and accessibility of seats. The prior steps focus on other aspects of the booking process but do not address the specific requirement for seat metadata validation. Therefore, it is not possible to confirm whether the requirement is satisfied or if there is a gap.
